summary: CP for Mamdani mayor question currently at 0.90, needs >0.91 on Sep 24. Markov model gives ~27% probability.
content: CP history shows two regimes: long periods at 0.90 (22 days, 8+ days) and brief spikes to 0.91-0.93 (6 days each). Current state is 0.90 for 8 consecutive days. Markov chain model with estimated transition rates (6.7% per day up, 16.7% per day down) gives 26-27% probability of being above 0.91 on Sep 24. Steady state is 28.6%. Sensitivity analysis ranges from 14-57% depending on assumed transition rates.
